case_title: RYAN WISE et al VS. TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WISE, RYAN WISE, YUSRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC. $6,473.63 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,628.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,473.63 FILED BY WISE, RYAN WISE, YUSRA AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF $80.00 SERVICE FEE. SERVED SEP-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMETN SERVICES, INC.
